description: catwalk comes up with yet another stylish pair of off-duty sandals for women. Crafted for high fashion and superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with skinny jeans or ethnic suits. Heel: 1" Upper Synthetic thong style straps with a synthetic toe separator Fabric velveteen footbed Synthetic patch on the heel Outsole TPU outsole with grooves on the heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
